'''banogo''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:avagraha|avagraha]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| b-n-g
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:avagraha|avagraha]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| banogo
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:bænegeth|bænegeth]] || [[word:bænegej|bænegej]] || [[word:bænegesh|bænegesh]] || [[word:bænege|bænege]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:banonogoth|banonogoth]] || [[word:banonogoj|banonogoj]] || [[word:banonogosh|banonogosh]] || [[word:banonogo|banonogo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:banogoth|banogoth]] || [[word:banogoj|banogoj]] || [[word:banogosh|banogosh]] || [[word:banogo|banogo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:banofgoth|banofgoth]] || [[word:banofgoj|banofgoj]] || [[word:banofgosh|banofgosh]] || [[word:banofgof|banofgof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:banogotho|banogotho]] || [[word:banogojo|banogojo]] || [[word:banogosho|banogosho]] || [[word:banogoko|banogoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:banogoth|banogoth]] || [[word:banogoj|banogoj]] || [[word:banogosh|banogosh]] || [[word:banogo|banogo]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:banogothol|banogothol]] || [[word:banogojol|banogojol]] || [[word:banogoshol|banogoshol]] || [[word:banogokol|banogokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:banogothotho|banogothotho]] || [[word:banogojojo|banogojojo]] || [[word:banogoshosho|banogoshosho]] || [[word:banogoko|banogoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:banogothon|banogothon]] || [[word:banogojon|banogojon]] || [[word:banogoshon|banogoshon]] || [[word:banogokon|banogokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:banogothoro|banogothoro]] || [[word:banogojoro|banogojoro]] || [[word:banogoshoro|banogoshoro]] || [[word:banogokoro|banogokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|7296ca6}}
